reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy bien. Las chicas del auto servicio les falta calidad de atención. Ni música pasan en el café

(Translated by Google)
The beach bars were great. The drive-thru staff lacked customer service. They don't even play music in the cafe.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar una pena lo del agua para mates tener que andar pidiendo monedas para poder conseguirla pero eso es por la empresa que pone los termos en las estaciones porque Las de termos taragui se llevan las monedas y la gente de la estación no disponen de ellas

(Translated by Google)
It's a great place, it's a shame about the hot water for mate; you have to go around asking for coins to get it. But that's because of the company that puts the thermoses in the stations, because the Taragui thermoses keep the coins and the station staff don't have any.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbC1yQVRBEAE
